news.title:
India's equity market faces challenges as retail investors turn net sellers amidst dimming returns and conflict impacts.
Capital market intermediaries like HDFC AMC (-15%) and Motilal Oswal (-25%) face pressure, with IPO activity also slowing.
news.summary:
India's equity market faces challenges as retail investors turn net sellers amidst dimming returns and conflict impacts.
Capital market intermediaries like HDFC AMC (-15%) and Motilal Oswal (-25%) face pressure, with IPO activity also slowing.

news.title:
Capital market stocks surged as US-Iran ceasefire boosted risk appetite. Nippon AMC rose 10.9%, HDFC AMC 8.6%, and BSE 8.3%.
Analysts expect AMCs like CAMS to outperform peers despite MTM pressures. Ceasefire seen as positive, though markets remain event-driven.
news.summary:
Capital market stocks surged as US-Iran ceasefire boosted risk appetite. Nippon AMC rose 10.9%, HDFC AMC 8.6%, and BSE 8.3%.
Analysts expect AMCs like CAMS to outperform peers despite MTM pressures. Ceasefire seen as positive, though markets remain event-driven.

news.title:
HDFC AMC's Navneet Munot expects record SIP inflows amid Iran-US ceasefire, urging retail investors to stay disciplined.
Munot advises enhancing equity allocation during volatility, citing March SIP inflows to hit all-time high per AMFI data.
news.summary:
HDFC AMC's Navneet Munot expects record SIP inflows amid Iran-US ceasefire, urging retail investors to stay disciplined.
Munot advises enhancing equity allocation during volatility, citing March SIP inflows to hit all-time high per AMFI data.

news.title:
HDFC Asset Management to hold a Q4 FY26 results call on April 16, 2026.
The call will feature key executives and provide audited financial results review.
news.summary:
HDFC Asset Management to hold a Q4 FY26 results call on April 16, 2026.
The call will feature key executives and provide audited financial results review.

news.title:
Kotak expects better returns from HDFC AMC than ICICI Prudential AMC due to valuation corrections.
HDFC AMC has a 17% upside, while ICICI AMC sees 11%. Both focus on growth in alternatives and strong fund performance.
news.summary:
Kotak expects better returns from HDFC AMC than ICICI Prudential AMC due to valuation corrections.
HDFC AMC has a 17% upside, while ICICI AMC sees 11%. Both focus on growth in alternatives and strong fund performance.

news.title:
March quarter AMC profits may fall sequentially due to MTM losses and softer yields, despite steady inflows.
ICICI Pru and Nippon AMC lead growth, while UTI AMC and Canara Robeco AMC lose market share amid performance gaps.
news.summary:
March quarter AMC profits may fall sequentially due to MTM losses and softer yields, despite steady inflows.
ICICI Pru and Nippon AMC lead growth, while UTI AMC and Canara Robeco AMC lose market share amid performance gaps.

news.title:
HDFC AMC executed an NSE block trade worth Rs. 32.02 crore.
The trade involved 138,049 shares at Rs. 2319.6 per share.
news.summary:
HDFC AMC executed an NSE block trade worth Rs. 32.02 crore.
The trade involved 138,049 shares at Rs. 2319.6 per share.

news.title:
HDFC AMC sees USD 69M inflows from MSCI Nifty semi-annual rebalancing.
Nifty index reshuffle at 3 PM today may impact HDFC AMC.
news.summary:
HDFC AMC sees USD 69M inflows from MSCI Nifty semi-annual rebalancing.
Nifty index reshuffle at 3 PM today may impact HDFC AMC.

news.title:
HDFC Gold ETF can now invest up to 50% in gold derivatives, GDS, and GMS under revised rules.
The change offers cost efficiency, liquidity, and flexibility, but physical gold remains the core strategy.
news.summary:
HDFC Gold ETF can now invest up to 50% in gold derivatives, GDS, and GMS under revised rules.
The change offers cost efficiency, liquidity, and flexibility, but physical gold remains the core strategy.

news.title:
HDFC AMC Board to meet on April 16, 2026, to review audited financial results for Q4 and FY26.
Dividend recommendation and trading window closure from April 1-18, 2026, also announced.
news.summary:
HDFC AMC Board to meet on April 16, 2026, to review audited financial results for Q4 and FY26.
Dividend recommendation and trading window closure from April 1-18, 2026, also announced.

news.title:
HDFC AMC shares surged 4% as MOFSL reiterated 'Buy', citing reasonable valuations and leadership in mutual funds.
MOFSL sees 20% upside to ₹2,700, driven by 17% AUM CAGR, strong SIP inflows, and resilient operating margins.
news.summary:
HDFC AMC shares surged 4% as MOFSL reiterated 'Buy', citing reasonable valuations and leadership in mutual funds.
MOFSL sees 20% upside to ₹2,700, driven by 17% AUM CAGR, strong SIP inflows, and resilient operating margins.

news.title:
63% of mutual funds raised cash levels in Feb amid volatility; equity funds held Rs 1.36 lakh crore in cash, up from Rs 1.35 lakh crore.
SBI Mutual Fund led cash increase adding Rs 4,597 crore, while HDFC saw the largest reduction of Rs 8,236 crore in Feb.
news.summary:
63% of mutual funds raised cash levels in Feb amid volatility; equity funds held Rs 1.36 lakh crore in cash, up from Rs 1.35 lakh crore.
SBI Mutual Fund led cash increase adding Rs 4,597 crore, while HDFC saw the largest reduction of Rs 8,236 crore in Feb.

news.title:
HDFC Mutual Fund reduced its stake in Sundram Fasteners via bulk deals worth ₹358 crore, selling shares on BSE and NSE at ₹832.17 avg price.
Sundram Fasteners hit a 52-week low of ₹818.2, falling 1.06%, with cumulative 10.78% loss over six sessions, underperforming Sensex YTD.
news.summary:
HDFC Mutual Fund reduced its stake in Sundram Fasteners via bulk deals worth ₹358 crore, selling shares on BSE and NSE at ₹832.17 avg price.
Sundram Fasteners hit a 52-week low of ₹818.2, falling 1.06%, with cumulative 10.78% loss over six sessions, underperforming Sensex YTD.

news.title:
HDFC Mutual Fund announces income distribution under IDCW options for select funds on March 5, 2026.
Distribution includes Rs 7/unit for Flexi Cap funds and Rs 0.75/unit for Multi Cap funds.
news.summary:
HDFC Mutual Fund announces income distribution under IDCW options for select funds on March 5, 2026.
Distribution includes Rs 7/unit for Flexi Cap funds and Rs 0.75/unit for Multi Cap funds.

news.title:
Sebi's FoF revamp spurs a boom in multi-asset funds; Rs 10,485 crore invested in January.
Multi-asset funds outpaced flexi-cap funds; gold and silver drive investor interest.
news.summary:
Sebi's FoF revamp spurs a boom in multi-asset funds; Rs 10,485 crore invested in January.
Multi-asset funds outpaced flexi-cap funds; gold and silver drive investor interest.

news.title:
Temasek and ADIA plan to invest in Clean Max's ₹31B IPO, alongside HDFC AMC and SBI Life.
Clean Max, backed by Brookfield, reserved ₹9.3B for anchor investors at ₹1,053/share.
news.summary:
Temasek and ADIA plan to invest in Clean Max's ₹31B IPO, alongside HDFC AMC and SBI Life.
Clean Max, backed by Brookfield, reserved ₹9.3B for anchor investors at ₹1,053/share.

news.title:
HDFC AMC's Q3 PAT rose 20% YoY to Rs 770 crore, driven by equity inflows.
Trent, Vedanta, and others saw profit growth up to 125% YoY in Q3.
news.summary:
HDFC AMC's Q3 PAT rose 20% YoY to Rs 770 crore, driven by equity inflows.
Trent, Vedanta, and others saw profit growth up to 125% YoY in Q3.

news.title:
HDFC AMC saw an NSE block trade of ~239,421 shares at Rs. 2897.7.
The total value of the transaction was Rs. 69.4 crores.
news.summary:
HDFC AMC saw an NSE block trade of ~239,421 shares at Rs. 2897.7.
The total value of the transaction was Rs. 69.4 crores.

news.title:
HDFC Mutual Fund declares income distribution under IDCW option for three funds.
The record date for income distribution is set as February 19, 2026.
news.summary:
HDFC Mutual Fund declares income distribution under IDCW option for three funds.
The record date for income distribution is set as February 19, 2026.

news.title:
Mutual fund folios rose by 7.1M in January, with Tata, Nippon, and HDFC seeing over 1M additions.
Nippon's gold fund inflows of ₹911.7M and growing SIP adoption boosted investor participation.
news.summary:
Mutual fund folios rose by 7.1M in January, with Tata, Nippon, and HDFC seeing over 1M additions.
Nippon's gold fund inflows of ₹911.7M and growing SIP adoption boosted investor participation.
